service.education.title: Full system training across all modules
service.education.lead: We deliver practical training for your whole team based on real workflows: dashboard, calendar, documents, tasks, finance planning, business processes, production, warehouse and employee cards.
service.education.p1: Role-based onboarding: what managers, operators, executives and admins do in the system every day.
service.education.p2: Hands-on sessions with your own scenarios and data, not abstract examples.
service.education.p3: Learning pack: session recordings, checklists, step-by-step instructions and internal FAQ templates.
service.education.p4: Final validation and follow-up support: we verify that the team can independently complete key operations.
service.education.modulesLead: Each module includes navigation, key actions, typical mistakes and control points for team leads.
service.education.m1Body: KPIs, revenue blocks, plan/fact, quick navigation from summary widgets to operational sections.
service.education.m2Body: Weekly/monthly planning, event scheduling, linked tasks and workload balancing by day.
service.education.m3Body: Folders, categories, document sources, naming standards, quick retrieval and handover rules.
service.education.m4Body: Table/Kanban/Gantt workflow, statuses, assignees, priorities, deadlines and module linkage.
service.education.m5Body: Budget periods, request-based planning, statuses, reconciliation and discipline of data updates.
service.education.m6Body: Templates, in-progress and completed flows, step control and process ownership responsibilities.
service.education.m7Body: Production monitor, queues, work-in-progress, pause/complete states, output and defect tracking.
service.education.m8Body: Stock balances, nomenclature, journals and revisions, and daily warehouse control routines.
service.education.m9Body: Employee cards, org structure, roles and contacts, accountability zones and communication hygiene.
service.education.resultsTitle: What your team gets after training
service.education.o1: Unified operating standard for all departments and roles.
service.education.o2: Faster onboarding of new employees through ready checklists and recordings.
service.education.o3: Fewer process errors and less manual chaos in tasks, production and warehouse operations.
service.education.o4: Transparent responsibility and measurable discipline in daily system usage.
service.education.outro: We adapt depth, pace and examples to your company size, role matrix and current implementation stage.
service.investors.title: Information for investors and strategic partners
service.investors.lead: Taska is developing a modular business management platform for companies in Uzbekistan and the region. Below is a frame for initial acquaintance.
service.investors.b1: Product: CRM/ERP suite, processes, integrations, Telegram — one operational environment.
service.investors.b2: Model: custom development, implementation, support; flexible software ownership formats.
service.investors.b3: Market: SMB and medium-sized businesses with a need for custom automation instead of “boxes”.
service.investors.b4: For details (metrics, roadmap, legal structure) - separate communication under NDA.
service.investors.outro: If you represent a fund or strategic investor, leave a request marked “investment” - we will send a presentation and arrange a call.
service.partners.title: For partners and integrators
service.partners.lead: We are open to cooperation with integrators, studios, consulting and independent experts who implement digital systems for clients.
service.partners.b1: Joint projects: you are the methodology and implementation, we are the platform and process improvements.
service.partners.b2: APIs and integrations: banks, telephony, accounting, marketplaces - according to technical specifications.
service.partners.b3: Training and certification of key partner specialists on the Taska product.
service.partners.b4: Commercial terms are discussed individually (referral, subcontract, white-label as agreed).
service.partners.outro: Write briefly about the company profile and types of clients - we will suggest a partnership format and the next step.
